title: GlucoPulse Diabetes Risk Prediction Input
description: Schema for user health features used in diabetes risk prediction. Calibrated for Indian adult population.

bmi.description: Body Mass Index (kg/m²). Note: WHO Asia-Pacific cutoffs apply — overweight at 23, obese at 27.5

waist_cm.description: Waist circumference in cm. ICMR thresholds: Male > 90cm, Female > 80cm = abdominal obesity

daily_steps.description: Average daily step count from pedometer/phone

sleep_hours.description: Average nightly sleep duration in hours

sedentary_hours.description: Daily sedentary hours (sitting, lying, desk work)

family_history.description: Family history of diabetes in first-degree relatives (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

sugary_drinks_per_week.description: Number of sugary beverages consumed per week (chai with sugar, cold drinks, juices)

refined_flour_meals_per_week.description: Meals containing refined flour (maida): naan, white bread, biscuits, pastries

indian_thali_per_week.description: Traditional Indian thali meals per week (rice/roti + dal + sabzi + sides)
